name: superpowers-plus
description: Workflow orchestration wrapping superpowers — front-to-back feature-building (brainstorm + adversarial design review + planning), enhanced plan writing with the Living Document Contract, adversarial plan review, structured session handoffs, and the full bug-hunt, health-review, and performance-audit workflows (four hunter methodologies + five-axis project health review + multi-lane performance review with execution-cost map + cycle skills, all in one plugin)
